instruction_ja:
[出力契約 — 機械検証用]
出力は次のJSONのみ(コードフェンス・説明文なし):
{"results": [{"id": "...", "title": "...", "where": "..."}], "count": 件数, "not_found": true|false}
与えられた資料の中に実在するものだけを挙げる(捏造禁止)。見つからなければ "results": [] / "count": 0 / "not_found": true。
instruction_en:
[Output contract — for mechanical verification]
Output ONLY this JSON (no code fences, no prose):
{"results": [{"id": "...", "title": "...", "where": "..."}], "count": N, "not_found": true|false}
List only items that actually exist in the given material (no fabrication). If nothing is found: "results": [] / "count": 0 / "not_found": true.
render_ja: 1行目に count(not_found=true なら「見つからず」)、以下 results を「- id: title (where)」で箇条書き。
render_en: First line: count (or "not found"); then one bullet per result as "- id: title (where)".
